holdings.infoBox: HLAL is an equity ETF with a total of 211 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 12.71%, Microsoft at 8.54%, Alphabet at 6.20%, Broadcom at 5.21%, and Alphabet at 5.02%.

overview.description: The Wahed FTSE USA Shariah ETF (HLAL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE USA Shariah index, a principles-selected, market-cap-weighted index of US equities. HLAL was launched on Jul 16, 2019 and is issued by Wahed.
